summary: Sprint complete — all 5 prior issues closed (#972, #973, #955, #957, #964). PR #1104 (educate mode fix) unblocked: rebased on main + format:fix for 5 files that were failing Prettier in main source tree; CI should now pass. P0 #1118 (SQLite bindings in worktrees) remains open and unassigned — senior coder assigned. Stuck kernel-sr agents from prior cycles noted for pruning. Systemic Prettier issue on main resolved by #1104.

prs.title: fix(adapters): educate mode always allows regardless of suggestion presence
prs.note: Rebased on main (4 commits). Format:fix applied to 5 storage/telemetry/CLI src files. All 248 adapter tests + 818 CLI tests pass on main. Previous failures were: (1) Prettier violations in old base, (2) go-fast-path tests that were pre-existing failures in old main state — both resolved after rebase.

retryLoops.note: kernel-sr agents stuck >16h but not active retry loops — worktrees are idle at ae37b15 with no commits; safe to prune

newAssignments.note: P0: governance runtime cannot start in worktrees due to missing better-sqlite3 bindings. Recommended fix: add --no-sqlite flag to agentguard guard for fail-open without storage. This is blocking swarm agents from self-governing.

triage.sprintGoal: Fix governance startup in worktrees (#1118 via --no-sqlite flag), land educate mode fix (PR #1104), begin false-positive matcher scope narrowing (#1119)

notableIssues.note: Swarm P0: 78% agents stuck. Escalated to director. Root cause likely #1118 (SQLite binding failure prevents governance startup, causing agents to abort on launch).
PR #1137 (stop hook wrapper for sub-repos) in review. Fixes #1120. Lint failure — other squad to address.
False positive: destructive detection fires on report content mentioning blocked command patterns. Medium priority — matcher needs scope narrowing.

blockers.description: P0: agentguard guard fails with SQLite bindings error in scheduler-spawned worktrees — governance runtime cannot start. Blocking self-governance for all worktree agents.
blockers.suggestedFix: Add --no-sqlite flag to agentguard guard to allow fail-open without storage when bindings unavailable

escalations.reason: Swarm P0: 78% of agent worktrees stuck/dead as of 18:02Z. Likely cascade from #1118 (SQLite bindings error prevents governance startup → agents abort at launch). Recommend holding new swarm spawns until #1118 is resolved. Two prunable worktrees (pr-merger-agent-1206357, pr-merger-agent-1207653) from 2026-03-25 can be cleaned.

testHealth.note: CLI package: 818 tests passing. Adapters: 248 tests passing. Both verified locally this cycle.

escalationRules.notes: #1118 persists from prior cycle (first seen 2026-03-27T14:19Z, reported at 18:00Z by previous EM, still unresolved at 21:10Z). Per rules: blocker persisting across 2 runs → escalate to director. Escalation filed.

dogfoodNotes.observation: Prettier violations in packages/storage/src/ and apps/cli/src/commands/inspect.ts were present on main (c295799) but not caught by recent CI since no PR touched those files. This caused ALL open PRs to fail lint. Fixed in PR #1104 — will land in main when merged.
dogfoodNotes.action: Included format:fix in PR #1104 rebase commit. Recommend tracking format compliance in main branch CI checks.
